events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — As the game clock expired, Tom Brady raised his arms in triumph along the sideline, whirled and tossed a football into the stands.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady throws for 2 TDs, SB champions dominate Eagles 31-15

headlines.description: — Kyle Shanahan walked onto the field with an emphatic nod, believing his San Francisco 49ers had beaten the Dallas Cowboys in a chaotic wild-card finish that left many not sure what was happening.
headlines.shortLinkText: 49ers hang on over Cowboys 23-17 in chaotic wild-card finish

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Chiefs were going nowhere on offense against Pittsburgh early Sunday night, so coach Andy Reid had wide receiver Mecole Hardman take a shotgun snap and hand off to running back Darrel Williams on a trick play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes leads Chiefs to 42-21 wild-card romp over Steelers
